summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Gamble Consultant v4.0.0 revamp. Fixed critical bug in consultant_engine.py (pre_match_probability parameter mapping). All backend API tests passed. Frontend shows 'GAMBLE CONSULTANT' branding correctly. ConsultantDashboard with Risk Tolerance toggle, Bookmaker Odds inputs, and Run Consultation button works on both PreMatch and LiveMatch pages. CONSULT tab is default selected on LiveMatch page.
passed_tests: GET /api/ returns 200 with version 4.0.0
GET /api/ returns message 'Gamble Consultant API'
GET /api/ returns dataSource 'GPT-5.4 Web Search'
POST /api/matches/{matchId}/consult returns 200
Consult returns win_probability (0-100)
Consult returns value_signal (STRONG_VALUE, VALUE, SMALL_EDGE, NO_BET, AVOID, WAIT_FOR_MORE_DATA, NO_MARKET)
Consult returns fair_decimal_odds
Consult with market_team1_odds and market_team2_odds returns edge_pct and overround
Consult returns confidence (0-1)
Consult returns uncertainty_band with low and high
Consult returns top_drivers array
Consult returns simulation with 10000 simulations and team score ranges (p10-p90)
Consult returns features object with phase, pressure_index, batting_depth_index, collapse_risk
Consult with risk_tolerance='safe' adjusts recommendation text
POST /api/matches/{matchId}/chat returns 200
Chat returns answer in plain language
Chat returns consultation_summary with win_probability and value_signal
Chat with market odds includes edge_pct in response
Chat respects risk_tolerance parameter
GET /api/schedule still works (70 matches)
POST /api/matches/{matchId}/fetch-live still works
GET /api/squads still works (10 teams)
Frontend header shows 'GAMBLE CONSULTANT'
Frontend MatchSelector shows 'GAMBLE CONSULTANT' title
Frontend LiveMatch page shows CONSULT tab as default selected tab
Consultant Dashboard shows Risk Tolerance toggle with 3 options: Play Safe, Balanced, Risk Taker
Consultant Dashboard shows Bookmaker Odds inputs
Consultant Dashboard shows Run Consultation button
Frontend PreMatch page shows ConsultantDashboard in right sidebar
Consultation results show Win Probability Gauge
Consultation results show Value Signal Badge (STRONG VALUE)
Consultation results show Edge Meter (+15.3%)
Consultation results show 10,000 Simulations (Neg. Binomial)
Consultation results show Player Impact section
Consultation results show Match State (Phase, Pressure, Depth, Collapse)
Consultation results show Chat Box

bugs_fixed.issue: TypeError: pre_match_probability() got an unexpected keyword argument 'T'
bugs_fixed.fix: Mapped compute_team_factors output keys (T, V, X, L, B) to pre_match_probability parameter names (team_strength, venue_advantage, toss_effect, lineup_depth, bowling_strength)

test_credentials: No authentication required - open access app
seed_data_creation: 70 IPL 2026 matches already in MongoDB from previous iteration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gamble Consultant v4.0.0 fully implemented and working. The consult endpoint takes 20-40 seconds due to GPT-5.4 web search calls for player stats. The chat endpoint takes 5-10 seconds for GPT response. Use --max-time 120 for curl tests. Match IDs: ipl2026_007 (CSK vs PBKS live), ipl2026_008 (DC vs MI upcoming). Do NOT trigger /api/schedule/load?force=true.
